---
name: Broken link or wrong number
about: A study link is dead, a citation is wrong, or a number doesn't match the source
title: "[Fix] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Which note?

Filename, e.g. `daily-walking.md`.

## What's wrong?

- [ ] Dead link
- [ ] Number doesn't match the source
- [ ] Citation is incorrect or incomplete
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## What did you expect vs. what's there?

Quote the line in the note and describe the discrepancy. If a number is wrong, include the correct number from the primary source with a link.
